qa_pairs.question: When was the webinar describing the META package recorded, and where can users view it?
qa_pairs.answer: The webinar describing the META package was recorded on October 6th, 2021, and can be viewed at [https://youtu.be/GcYbaPClwGE here].

qa_pairs.question: What advice is given to users who are eager to start using the META package quickly?
qa_pairs.answer: Users who are eager to start using the META package can follow the quick start steps provided, but it is highly recommended to also read the rest of the page for more detailed information.
